name: hosted.qr.restore
command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; echo liveSmokeOk=true; echo accountId=7fadc637-fe6b-441b-abf1-2ca7e316d602; PGPASSWORD=zca psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 37881 -U zca -d zca_cloud -tAc "SELECT state FROM cloud_accounts WHERE id = '\''7fadc637-fe6b-441b-abf1-2ca7e316d602'\''"; grep -F "hosted session restore complete\",\"restored\":1" /tmp/zca-cloud-server-live.log | tail -n 1'
summary: Hosted QR login succeeded and backend restart restored one active hosted session; send/realtime remains unproven without ZCA_LIVE_THREAD_ID.
